race.comment: MENZIES CREEK (5) is poised to win after placing at his last three outings, most recently when third over 1200m at Swan Hill when he was handy all the way. Gets every hope from a low draw and should go close. THE BOTANY FROG (7) has been in the betting recently but has failed to live up to market expectations, look for a better run first go synthetic having struggled to pick up on heavy ground his past two. LYREBIRD LADY (10) has been fair in two runs to date, boxing on for fifth at Hamilton last time off a solid debut at Geelong. Up in trip should suit now and she can improve. LION CITY EXPRESS (4) resumes having been well beaten on debut on heavy ground, wipe that and he can do much better.
